# Molten Egg

## Description

Attack cards are upgraded when added to the deck.

---

## Strategy Notes

<!-- Reserved for the meta-agent. Append lessons, combos, and heuristics here.

- Raises the value of future Attack rewards and shop attacks because they enter upgraded; still skip attacks that do not solve the deck's current damage, draw, AoE, or boss plan.
